code: import React,{useState}from'react';import{useNavigate}from'react-router-dom';import{useAuth}from'../../context/AuthContext';import'./AdminLogin.css';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";export default function AdminLogin(){const[username,setUsername]=useState('');const[password,setPassword]=useState('');const[error,setError]=useState('');const[loading,setLoading]=useState(false);const{login}=useAuth();const navigate=useNavigate();const handleSubmit=async e=>{e.preventDefault();setLoading(true);setError('');try{await login(username.trim(),password.trim());navigate('/dashboard');}catch(err){setError('Wrong username or password');}setLoading(false);};return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"login-page grid-bg",children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"login-box",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"login-icon",children:"NR"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h2",{className:"login-title",children:"Admin Panel"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{className:"login-sub",children:"Sign in to manage portfolio content"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("form",{onSubmit:handleSubmit,className:"login-form",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"field",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("label",{children:"Username"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("input",{type:"text",value:username,placeholder:"Neelamohan",required:true,onChange:e=>setUsername(e.target.value)})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"field",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("label",{children:"Password"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("input",{type:"password",value:password,placeholder:"1234",required:true,onChange:e=>setPassword(e.target.value)})]}),error&&/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{className:"login-error",children:error}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{type:"submit",className:"btn-primary",style:{width:'100%'},disabled:loading,children:loading?'Signing in...':'Sign In'})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{className:"login-hint",children:"Username: Neelamohan \xA0|\xA0 Password: 1234"})]})});}
